installer-gui-script.title: NS4MCP — Nord Stage 4 for Claude
installer-gui-script.welcome:
This installs the NS4MCP server (a portable Node runtime + the app) and adds it to your Claude Desktop configuration.
After installing, quit and reopen Claude Desktop, then ask it to control your Nord Stage 4. Don't forget to enable NRPN on the instrument (MIDI menu, page 7).
